description: Canonical CSS tokens whose source value uses CSS constructs with no DTCG-conformant shape (color-mix, clamp, calc, CSS shorthand, gradients/borders/shadows over light-dark() colours, multi-layer values). They remain authoritative in src/frontend/styles/theme.css and are deliberately omitted from the DTCG snapshot.

tokens.reason: CSS construct has no DTCG-conformant shape (color-mix, clamp/calc, shorthand, gradient/border/shadow over light-dark() colours, multi-layer with `none`).
tokens.recommendation: Three-layer box-shadow including an `inset` highlight layer. DTCG `shadow` here only structures non-inset `offset offset blur [spread] colour` layers, so the inset layer blocks lifting. Stays authoritative in CSS; if DTCG introspection is needed, split the inset highlight into its own non-inset token or wait for inset-aware shadow lifting.

tokens.reason: CSS construct has no DTCG-conformant shape (color-mix, clamp/calc, shorthand, gradient/border/shadow over light-dark() colours, multi-layer with `none`).
tokens.recommendation: Two-layer box-shadow including an `inset` highlight layer. Same path as --forge-bar-shadow: the inset layer has no DTCG-conformant shadow shape here. Stays authoritative in CSS.
